translations.landing.useCases.ai.approachDesc: AI is powerful but not perfect. Flyto2 lets AI do the heavy lifting while keeping people in charge of the final call.
translations.landing.useCases.ai.balance.desc: AI should help people work faster, not make decisions for them. Flyto2 is designed with this principle at its core.
translations.landing.useCases.ai.balance.title: The Right Balance
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step1.label: Receive:
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step2.label: AI reads:
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step2.text: Extract vendor name, amount, items, due date
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step3.label: Flag:
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step3.text: Highlight anything AI isn't sure about
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step4.label: Review:
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step4.text: A person checks flagged items and corrects if needed
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step5.label: Done:
translations.landing.useCases.ai.step5.text: Create the payment entry and send for approval
translations.landing.useCases.ai.subtitle: Let AI do the work, let people make the calls
translations.landing.useCases.ai.title: AI + Human Review Workflow
translations.landing.useCases.approval.problem: Many workflows need someone to approve before the next step happens — like purchase orders, expense reports, or contracts. But most automation tools can't pause and wait for that approval.
translations.landing.useCases.approval.quote: "We automated 200+ approval workflows while keeping the human judgment our compliance requires."
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result1.desc: Standard approvals from days to hours
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result1.title: 80% Faster Processing
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result2.title: 100% Traceable
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result3.desc: Go back, fix, and continue — no data lost
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result3.title: Zero Data Loss on Errors
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result4.desc: Critical decisions still made by people
translations.landing.useCases.approval.result4.title: People Stay in Control
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step1.label: Start:
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step2.label: Check:
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step2.text: Verify budget, vendor, and approval limits
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step3.label: Approve:
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step3.text: Send to manager for review and sign-off
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step4.label: Execute:
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step4.text: Create order, notify vendor, update system
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step5.label: Record:
translations.landing.useCases.approval.step5.text: Screenshot and log every step for the record
translations.landing.useCases.approval.subtitle: Multi-step approval workflows with a full record for compliance
translations.landing.useCases.approval.title: Approval Workflows
translations.landing.useCases.cta.description: Tell us about your workflow challenges. We'll show you how Flyto2 can help.
translations.landing.useCases.cta.title: Which use case fits your needs?
translations.landing.useCases.hero.description: See how teams use Flyto2 to automate complex workflows that need human judgment, approval steps, and a full record of every action.
translations.landing.useCases.hero.title: Real-World
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.insight.desc: The best automation isn't fully automatic. It's automation that knows its limits and asks for help when it needs to.
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.insight.title: Key Insight
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.problem: Automation works great for 95% of cases. But that 5% can cause real damage if handled automatically. You need automation that knows when to stop and ask a person.
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step1.label: Load:
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step2.label: Check:
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step2.text: Verify each record against your rules
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step3.label: Pause:
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step3.text: Flag unusual amounts, missing info, or duplicates
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step4.label: Review:
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step4.text: A person reviews flagged items and decides what to do
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step5.label: Continue:
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.step5.text: Process approved items, skip rejected ones
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.subtitle: Automation that pauses at critical moments for a person to check
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.title: Human-in-the-Loop Automation
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.when1: High-value transactions above a certain amount
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.when2: Data that doesn't match expected patterns
translations.landing.useCases.hitl.when5: Any action that's hard to undo
translations.landing.useCases.industries.subtitle: Any workflow that needs human oversight and a full record
translations.landing.useCases.industries.title: Industries Using Flyto2
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.approach1: Record your workflow by showing how you do it
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.approach2: Run 1 first, check the result, then run the rest
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.approach3: Auto-pause when something doesn't look right
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.approach4: Screenshot every action for the record
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.fail3: One error ruins the entire batch
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.fail4: No record for tracking what happened
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.keepRpa: Keep using your existing tools for:
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.keepRpa1: High-volume, stable processes that rarely change
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.keepRpa3: Processes that don't need human approval
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.migration.desc: Already using other automation tools? Flyto2 can work alongside them. Use Flyto2 for the workflows that need human oversight, and keep your existing tools for everything else.
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.migration.title: Works Alongside Your Existing Tools
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.problem: Your internal system doesn't have a way to connect automatically. Your admin panel only lets you do one thing at a time. The only option is to click through everything manually.
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.subtitle: When your system doesn't offer a shortcut, Flyto2 does it for you
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.title: Automate Systems That Don't Have Shortcuts
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.useFlyto1: Workflows that need someone to approve
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.useFlyto2: Keeping everything on your own computer
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.useFlyto3: Quick automation before committing to a bigger solution
translations.landing.useCases.rpa.useFlyto4: Screens and pages that change frequently
